title: Hammer Mace 2D
description: A Mace that looks VERY menacing in 2D
body: A fully 2D mace rendered in a true two-dimensional style. Although it shares visual similarities with [GugerOS’s mace design](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-mace-hammer), this rendition is intentionally flatter and more stylized. Its silhouette leans toward a hammer-like shape, and the texture is carefully crafted at a clean 32×32 resolution.
